expectations: Runs init-try script (node scripts/run.mjs) or creates structure manually
Creates required subdirectories (plans, reports, logs, codemaps, humanmaps)

evals.prompt: try-claude 초기화를 해야 하는데 이미 .claude/try-claude 폴더가 있어. 어떻게 해?
evals.expected_output: 기존 디렉토리 감지, 덮어쓰기 확인, 또는 migration 안내
expectations: Suggests migration skill for updating existing setup
Does not blindly overwrite existing files

evals.prompt: try-claude를 초기화하고 어떤 파일이 생성되는지 상세히 알려줘
evals.expected_output: 생성되는 디렉토리/파일 목록과 각 역할 설명
expectations: Lists all created directories and files
Explains the purpose of each directory (codemaps, humanmaps, references, etc.)
